name: Cross-Platform Sync & Admin
completed_work: 54-01: iOS/Watch cross-platform sync — Restore Purchases + Manage Subscription rows added to SettingsViewController; WatchSyncManager.swift singleton with WCSessionDelegate for Watch entitlement sync
54-02: Android cross-platform sync — Restore Purchases + Manage Subscription rows added to SettingsScreen; entitlement listener in MainActivity.onResume()

54-03: Web cross-platform sync + Admin Dashboard — Stripe portal link in Settings; useEntitlementSync hook with real-time Supabase subscription_status; admin subscription dashboard with /api/admin/subscriptions endpoint
remaining_work: Stage and commit all Phase 54 implementation files
Update ROADMAP.md to reflect Phase 54 complete
Update STATE.md to reflect Phase 54 complete
Create and commit Phase 54 planning docs if not already committed
Verify Phase 54 implementation compiles and works correctly
decisions: WatchSyncManager.swift singleton adopts WCSessionDelegate, sends entitlement dict via WCSession.default.updateApplicationContext()
Android uses Play Store subscription URL (not.restorePurchases which was deemed redundant — restore handled by platform)
Web admin dashboard at /admin/subscriptions with useEntitlementSync hook using Supabase real-time
Entitlements synced across platforms via shared RevenueCat appUserID = Supabase auth.uid
phase_50_note: Phase 50 (RevenueCat SDK) was implemented but lives on branch milestone/M002, not merged to main. Separate tracking needed.
